story: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
title: AI Startup Raises $130M
script: Sixty-nine percent of enterprises share API keys across AI agents. This staggering finding puts entire workflows at risk, as one compromised agent can unlock all associated permissions and workflows. The implications are disastrous, with potential for AI systems to be used as weapons or tools for malicious activities, affecting not just the enterprise, but also its customers and partners. As AI becomes more ubiquitous, the risks grow, so what's the true cost of this reckless approach to AI security now?
tiktok_caption: AI Startup Raises $130M - full story on Startup Wire Daily, free on all podcast apps. #news #startup
